## 1. Visual Theme & Atmosphere

---

## 2. Color Palette & Roles

- **Canvas** (#______) — primary background  
- **Ink** (#______) — primary text  
- **Muted** (#______) — secondary text  
- **Accent** (#______) — single CTA/focus (saturation < 80%)  
- **Border** (rgba…) — structural lines  

Max one primary accent. No neon purple. No pure `#000` body text.
